description: 专门用于电商鞋子图的背景移除工作流，输出纯白底产品图

prompts.positive: professional product photography, single shoe, pure white background RGB(255,255,255), no shadows, clean composition, studio lighting, high detail, sharp focus, photorealistic, 8k uhd, product showcase, e-commerce standard
prompts.negative: blur, noise, grain, low quality, cluttered background, colored background, gradient, shadows, people, model, feet, text, watermark, logo, multiple shoes, shoe box, accessories, patterns, textures in background

notes: 适用场景：原图背景复杂，需要完全移除背景
输出：纯白底 RGB(255,255,255)，无阴影
适用平台：淘宝、京东、亚马逊
优化重点：鞋子边缘清晰，无毛边，无背景残留

usage_instructions.step_1: 将原始鞋子图片拖入 LoadImage 节点
usage_instructions.step_2: BiRefNet 节点自动移除背景
usage_instructions.step_3: ControlNet Canny 节点保持鞋子轮廓（权重 0.95）
usage_instructions.step_4: ControlNet Depth 节点保持立体感（权重 0.65）
usage_instructions.step_6: 输出节点自动替换纯白底 RGB(255,255,255)
usage_instructions.step_7: 检查输出图片：鞋子边缘、背景纯白度、细节清晰度

鞋子边缘有毛边.solution: 提高 Canny 权重到 0.98，降低 Denoise 到 0.35

背景不够纯白.solution: 调整 Prompt 增加 (pure white background:1.3)，后处理用 Levels 工具调整白场

鞋子结构变形.solution: 提高 Canny 权重到 0.98，确认原图边缘清晰

细节丢失.solution: 降低 Denoise 到 0.35，增加 Steps 到 35
